messages.content:
user just said "Hi" - this is a greeting. I should respond briefly and naturally, following the CLAUDE.md instructions which state:
- Reply in Chinese
- Conclusion first
- No code blocks in response body
- Be professional, no nonsense

The system reminder mentions session start hooks and a code discovery protocol, but the user hasn't asked anything substantive yet. I should just greet back briefly.

Let me keep it simple and Chinese, as the CLAUDE.md instructs.</think>

老板好。CCC 已就绪（v0.28.1，Engine + 看板在跑）。今天有什么要落地的？
